linkedin.text:
We don't ask clients to write testimonials. We ask them to describe one moment.

Here's what they said:

"The moment our CEO walked over to Yossi — who had been with us 18 years and had the best quarter of his career — and handed him the award personally in front of 80 colleagues. Yossi cried. His manager cried. I cried. That moment was worth more than any salary I could have offered."
— VP Sales, leading tech company, Barcelona trip

"When we walked into the private cooking studio in Rome and saw it had been set up like a competition — with team names, individual stations, and a real chef judge — the energy changed completely. I've never seen a group of Israeli executives so focused and competitive over who could make the best pasta."
— HR Director, insurance company, Rome trip

"We'd done company trips before. Hotels, dinners, guided tours. Always fine. Never remarkable. This was the first time I heard people say 'I've never done anything like this before.' That's what we paid for. That's what we got."
— CEO, healthcare company, Prague trip

This is what we build. Not events. Moments.

If you want your next event to be remarkable, let's talk.
📩 alon@upe.co.il | 🌐 upe.co.il

#Testimonials #CorporateEvents #ClientStories #IncentiveTravel #EventProduction #UproductionEvents #MICE #EmployeeRecognition #TeamBuilding #EventResults
linkedin.cta: DM or visit upe.co.il to start planning
